conversation.message_text: Bonafide: Perimenopause makeover? Load up on good fats & protein, skip the sugar slump, and feel fabulous from the inside out bonafide.attn.tv/a9Qpb1tBtYrN

Bonafide: Spice things up with playful moves, fresh routines, and a sexy mindset-your spark just got an upgrade. 
bonafide.attn.tv/asjbE8mvlCqw
Bonafide: Stay intimate, stay vibrant - sex after menopause supports health and happiness. bonafide.attn.tv/a9ex9hnT_gLY

Bonafide: More restful nights, coming soon 🌙
In the meantime, here's what impacts sleep → bonafide.attn.tv/aKkTUheR8ugV
Bonafide: Menopause messing with your sleep? Try a cool room, a calm wind-down, and less caffeine to help you snooze again. bonafide.attn.tv/aIY4TjcSEZx5
Bonafide: Hi, this is Heather from Bonafide! Any questions about our products? bonafide.attn.tv/aoCw0eUju5uj .

Hi Heather I have been taking Thermella for over a year now and my hot flashes are still waking me up all night long. I am currently at my physicians office asking if Relizen is safe for me since I am post breast cancer treatment. Do you have any other suggestions to improve sleep and hot flashes/night sweats

Bonafide: I'm sorry about that! The Relizen is also a good choice, but it will be great to consult it with your physician. Thermella and Relizen were both shown in separate clinical studies to relieve hot flashes and night sweats. However, Thermella relieves hot flashes as early as just two weeks. It relieves hot flashes at the source by blocking NKB, a peptide in the body's thermoregulatory center that triggers hot flashes and night sweats. On the other hand, Relizen works as early as two months by inhibiting the reuptake of serotonin in the body. Both treatments are effective, but Thermella has been shown to provide more hot flash and night sweat relief, faster. 

Please note that these results for Thermella and Relizen are based on separate clinical studies for each product. Hope this helps!
Thank you
Could the two be used together?  And does the relizen contain green tea extract?
How are your studies on bioavailability?  Maybe I am just not absorbing the product

Bonafide: No worries! Thermella and Relizen can be used together and work differently in the body to relieve hot flashes and night sweats. Thermella relieves hot flashes at the source by blocking NKB, a peptide in the body's thermoregulatory center that triggers hot flashes and night sweats. Relizen relieves hot flashes by inhibiting the reuptake of serotonin in the body. In independent clinical studies on each of these treatments, they were shown to be effective in reducing hot flashes and night sweats, as well as improving sleep.

And no, the relizen does not contain green tea extract. You can check out the ingredients here: https://bonafide.attn.tv/ac81GRegBPnw 


Regarding your last question, let me pass this along to my team for further checking, and I'll text you as soon as I get an update on this. I'll be in touch!
Do you have samples of the relizen that I can try
Template used: "Do you have samples?"; last updated: 2022-12-16 22:33:01.018
Bonafide: At this time, we don't provide samples directly to patients; however, you can check with your healthcare provider to see if they have samples of our products.

Rumored: Hey, this is Jordan, from Rumored. Thanks for checking out our site! https://shoprumored.attn.tv/aaR7y2ZWgJvQ 

Are there any questions I can answer for you?

Yes actually! I was trying all weekend to get the sun valley Sherpa in fatale with your sale and it kept adding the discount and they not letting me checkout with my card! I sent an email but then never heard anything back!

Rumored: I understand how frustrating this situation must be, especially when dealing with payment difficulties. 

Please double-check that the billing ZIP code you entered matches the one linked to your credit card. I also recommend trying to open the site in an incognito or private window to rule out any browser cache or extension issues. Are you seeing any specific error messages on your end? 

Since you already emailed us, someone from the team will get back to you as soon as possible. Please check your spam and promo folders as well, as our emails sometimes end up there.
It says shipping can not be completed
Rumored: I am very sorry for the inconvenience. What about in an incognito window? Are you still having the same issue?
